metadata.title: Portfolio — Nikoloz Pairaziani | Frontend Developer
metadata.description: Portfolio of frontend developer Nikoloz Pairaziani. 5+ years building SPAs and desktop apps for fintech and EdTech.
metadata.keywords: frontend developer, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Electron, portfolio, SPA, web development

aside.heroTitle: Hi! I'm Nikoloz. I build web services and desktop applications.
aside.heroDescription: 5+ years of experience. I build SPAs and desktop apps for fintech and EdTech.

home.contactTitle: I'm open to offers and ready to strengthen your team. Shall we talk details?

0.title: I live in Moscow and I'm happily married
0.description: I was born in Tbilisi, but I'm now based in Moscow. I'm married, I value a cozy home and support from loved ones. For me it's important to balance active work and personal life so I stay productive and energized.

1.title: I play guitar and sing for myself
1.description: When I'm not writing code, I pick up a guitar. I'm a musician, and it helps me switch off. Creativity in music and development is very similar — harmony, rhythm, and attention to detail matter in both.

2.title: I've been writing code professionally for over 4 years
2.description: I specialize in React and Next.js. For me, frontend isn't just visuals — it's how the user feels the product. I build fast, responsive apps where technical quality serves business goals.

experience.title: Experience
experience.prospectBody: I'm currently looking for a full-time role. I'm interested in working with React, Next.js, and Electron, building fast, user-friendly interfaces that solve real business problems.

distillery.description: Building interfaces for an ERP system for corporate finance management. Client — a large logistics company.
details: Built interfaces for an ERP system for corporate finance management.
Implemented analytics dashboards with charts and diagrams for financial flows.
Built high-performance tables for large datasets: filtering, sorting, pagination.
Generated financial reports in PDF format.
Integrated REST APIs and improved performance with lazy loading and virtualization.

webvalley.description: Building a platform for an online school: student account and teacher admin panel.
details: Built a platform for an online school: student account and teacher admin panel.
Implemented course, lesson, and homework management.
Built an admin panel with filtering, sorting, and user search.
Multilingual UI (RU / EN / ES), complex forms with validation and autosave.
Performance optimizations: lazy loading and list virtualization.

veev.role: React Frontend Developer | Next.js, Electron, TypeScript
veev.description: Adaptive interfaces for interactive museum installations across Russia (touch kiosks and large screens), including real-time content updates and performance tuning under heavy load.
details: Adaptive interfaces for interactive stands in 15+ Moscow museums serving 50k+ visitors per month.
Real-time content updates and integration with APIs/local services without full UI reload.
Designed a dual-window Electron architecture (Control/Display) with IPC and TCP to an external lighting controller.
Performance tuning with react-virtuoso and Framer Motion: FPS from 30 to 60 under load.
Idle detection and auto sleep mode, reducing power consumption by ~35%.

askbefore.description: A modern confidential platform for sharing medical test results (STI) between partners. Focus on privacy, data security, and UX.
details: Secure platform on Next.js 15 and TypeScript for 5k+ active users with 99.9% uptime.
End-to-end encryption for files and secure data exchange, GDPR compliance.
Stripe Connect for a medical services marketplace (100k+ transactions in Q1) and Mapbox for clinic geolocation.
PostgreSQL + Prisma schema design, CI/CD, i18n support, strong SSR/RSC performance.
Modular architecture with Clean Architecture and SOLID: ~40% faster feature delivery and easier onboarding.
